name: Fitsume Teshome
title: Evaluation of gridded precipitation data in water availability modeling in CONUS
alt: Maps of Kling-Gupta Efficiency (KGE) for streamflow simulations across the contiguous United States, comparing five meteorological forcing datasets: CPC, GRIDMET, W5E5, EWEMBI, and WFDEI.
caption: Figure: Kling-Gupta Efficiency (KGE) of streamflow simulations against gauges across CONUS (1979–2016) under five gridded forcing datasets — CPC, GRIDMET, W5E5, EWEMBI, and WFDEI.
citation: Teshome, F., Mekonnen, M.M., et al. Journal of Hydrology.

name: Mahlet Melaku
title: Adsorptive Removal of PFAS from Aqueous Solutions Using GAC, PAC and Ball-Milled Colloidal Activated Carbon: Characterizing Efficiency, Kinetics, and Mechanisms
alt: Adsorption kinetics and isotherm plots for PFOA, PFOS, PFBA, and PFBS on activated carbon, including pseudo-first/second-order kinetic fits, intraparticle diffusion, and Langmuir/Freundlich isotherms.
caption: Figure: Adsorption kinetics and isotherm modeling of PFOA, PFOS, PFBA, and PFBS on ball-milled colloidal activated carbon.
citation: Kebede, M.M., Al Masud, M.A., Ortbal, S., Shin, W.S., Mekonnen, M.M., Clement, T.P., Terry, L.G. (2025). ACS ES&T Water, 5(11), 6554–6566.

name: Betelhem Wondimneh Demeke
title: Global Spatially Detailed Water Footprint of Crop Production Over Five Decades
alt: Sankey diagrams showing the green and blue water footprint of global crop production by crop group and end use, comparing 1972 and 2018.
caption: Figure: Green and blue water footprint of global crop production, by crop group and end use, comparing 1972 and 2018.
citation: Demeke, B.W., Mekonnen, M.M., Brauman, K.A., Magliocca, N., Moradkhani, H. (2026). Scientific Reports.

name: Habtamu Tamiru
title: Improving Annual Streamflow Estimates Using Budyko Parameterization Driven by Catchment Attributes
alt: Scatter plots showing deviations of calibrated and machine-learning-adjusted evaporative index from the Budyko curve across six different Budyko parameterizations.
caption: Figure: Deviations of SCE-calibrated and machine-learning-adjusted evaporative index from the Budyko curve, across six parameterizations.
citation: Tamiru, H., Mekonnen, M.M., Kumar, M. (2026). Journal of Hydrology X, 30, 100216.
